name: smartstudy-backend
description: Python API — not an Expo app. Use npm scripts below or run from repo root.

scripts.start:
node -e "console.log('
This folder is the Python backend only.

  Start mobile app:  npm run mobile   (from here) or  npm start  (from repo root)
  Start backend API: npm run backend  (from repo root)

Do not run npx expo start from backend/ — it will fail.
'); process.exit(1)"
